org.siprop.v2.core.messge
Interface FlatMessage

All Superinterfaces:
java.lang.Cloneable, Message, java.io.Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractFlatMessage, FlatSIPMessage
public interface FlatMessage
extends Message

This interface expresses a flat message.

Author:
noritsuna

Method Summary
 FlatMessage convertTo(java.lang.Object message)
          convert to a different flat message.
 java.lang.Object getMessage()
          get message object.
 void setMessage(java.lang.Object message)
          set message object.
 

Method Detail

getMessage

java.lang.Object getMessage()
get message object.

Returns:
message object

setMessage

void setMessage(java.lang.Object message)
set message object.

Parameters:
message - message object

convertTo

convert to a different flat message.

message - target message object

converted message object
